name: bluealpha-marketing-plugin
description: Paid media strategy, analysis, and measurement powered by BlueAlpha's unified MCP (Google Ads + Meridian MMM). 20 skills covering competitive strategy, SEO/paid bridging, creative refresh, audience intelligence, incrementality testing, geo expansion, budget reallocation, saturation analysis, attribution reconciliation, and scenario planning — analysis-only, with execution routed through the BlueAlpha pipeline. Requires the bluealpha-mcp connector.
